raw_consumer_statement:
Please accept this COMPLAINT concerning Citibank and its failure to clear fraudulent charges made on my Citibank credit card account. The fraudulent charges total {$7100.00}, incurred on XX/XX/XXXX by a company called XXXX XXXX in XXXX. 

I became aware of these charges on XX/XX/XXXX, when I received a call from XXXX XXXX at Citibank stating suspicious activity was noticed on my card. This was labeled as the date fraud was reported. I informed XXXX XXXX that neither me nor my husband made these charges and they were in fact fraudulent. During this conversation, XXXX XXXX advised me to submit a police report in support of my claim- especially since she stated it appeared to be fraudulent on her end given the recent trends in XXXX at the time. In accordance with her instructions, my husband filed a complaint with the local Colombian authorities, and the police report was subsequently submitted to Citibank on multiple occasions ( XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX ). Additionally, I followed up with multiple phone calls concerning the status of my case on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX. Finally, I emailed the Citibank Executive Response Team on XX/XX/XXXX. 

At some point, it appears that this " suspicious activity '' was redesignated as a disputed charge. At no point, however, was I told what investigation was conducted to verify the fraudulent charges, and dismiss them from my account. Citibank never informed me whether there was a chargeback to the merchant and never provided me with the representation documents provided by the merchant to support the charge. In fact, the only meaningful information concerning the investigation I was told was that the police report we filed was neither reviewed nor considered. 

I have since received notices stating that this dispute -- flagged immediately as suspicious activity and immediately confirmed as such within 24 hours -- was resolved against me. I was never given the opportunity to speak with a supervisor who could explain this determination and how it was reached. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I spoke to another supervisor named " XXXX '' from the fraud department who again refused to explain anything further. Finally, I reached out to the Citibank Executive Unit on XX/XX/XXXX and received a response on XX/XX/XXXX. The response not only dismissed my request to review the case along with the certified, translated police report, but also threatened to report me for nonpayment of these known fraudulent activities on my card.
